issue_title: Very large SQL Lab result export times out intermittently

structured_output.root_cause_analysis: The export streamed the entire result set into memory before writing, hitting the request timeout on large queries.
structured_output.resolution_summary: Stream the result set to the CSV writer in chunks instead of materialising it fully in memory.

file_changes.change_summary: Chunk the CSV export instead of full in-memory materialisation.

code_diff:
--- a/superset/result_set.py
+++ b/superset/result_set.py
@@
-    rows = list(cursor.fetchall())
-    df.to_csv(buf)
+    for chunk in cursor.fetchmany_iter(10_000):
+        chunk.to_csv(buf, header=buf.tell() == 0)

worklog.message: Investigate and fix issue #9006: Very large SQL Lab result export times out intermittently
Reproduced the issue, identified the root cause and opened a PR. Stream the result set to the CSV writer in chunks instead of materialising it fully in memory.
